calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2021 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Aug-24-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Nass Enterprise, Inc., a California corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Paul Belva, Esq. appeared for plaintiff DCP SF Columbus Ave Owner, LLC.
John Hoffart, Custodian of Records for plainitff DCP SF Columbus Ave Owner, LLC, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Belva and Hoffart appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Nass Enterprise, Inc., a California corporation.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Lease and Money Damages was filed February 28, 2020.
Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint for Breach of Lease and Money Damages was filed April 23, 2020.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, First Amended Complaint and accompanying documents occurred on September 2, 2020 and was effectuated on September 13, 2020.
Default as to defendant Nass Enterprise, Inc., a California corporation, was entered on October 16, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 8, 2021.

Plaintiff DCP SF Columbus Ave Owner, LLC submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit A: Restaurant Lease Agreement dated 09/15/1995................................ID/EVID
Exhibit B: First Amendment to Restaurant Lease Agreement 10/5/1995....................ID/EVID
Exhibit C: Letter from N. Rassa to K. Barr dated 11/15/2002...........................ID/EVID
Exhibit D: Assignment and Extension of Lease dated 6/30/2014..........................ID/EVID
Exhibit E: Second Extension of Lease dated 6/31/2014..................................ID/EVID
Exhibit F: Extension of Restaurant Lease dated 9/30/2015..............................ID/EVID
Exhibit G: Fourth Extension of Lease dated 9/30/2017..................................ID/EVID
Exhibit H: Fifth Extension of Restaurant Lease Agreement dated 10/15/2017.............ID/EVID
Exhibit I: Spreadsheet re: Samer Enterprises Corp. 8/31/2019 through 12/15/2019.......ID/EVID
Exhibit J: Change Order to Prime Contract dated 10/16/2020............................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff DCP SF Columbus Ave Owner, LLC, and against the defaulted defendant Nass Enterprise, Inc., a California corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $184,559.19.
Prejudgment Interest - $17,081.52.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $576.40.

Total - $205,042.11.

Counsel for plaintiff to prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
